page.title: Published Work
page.html:
• Homage to Colonel Rainborough - Omanawa Press, NZ 1984

  • Being Determined - The Cornford Press, Launceston, Tasmania, 1990

  • Stirring Stuff, 99 poems, Sinclair-Stevenson, London, 1993

  • Lunar Frost - translations from the Tang and Song dynasties - Brandl & Schlesinger, Sydney, 2000

  • Letters & Characters - The Cornford Press, 2001

Selwyn's poems appeared in more than seventy magazines and newspapers around the world, some of which are: The Age, The Australian Weekend Review, Island, Meanjin, Overland, Southerly, The Sydney Morning Herald, Westerly; Descant, The Fiddlehead, (Canada); Encounter, The Guardian, The Independent, London Magazine, The North, Rialto, The Spectator, Thumbscrew (England); , Honest Ulsterman, Krino, Metre, Poetry Ireland; The Exquisite Corpse (US), Iowa Review, Kenyon Review; Partisan Review; Planet, New Welsh Review , Poetry Wales.
